strengths: Extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, and Node.js across multiple domains
Proven ability to own end-to-end systems, from APIs to UIs and DevOps infrastructure
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication skills demonstrated through workshops and projects
concerns: Job titles (e.g., Staff/Senior) suggest senior-level experience inconsistent with entry-level role requirements
Limited explicit mention of PostgreSQL, Nest.js, or AWS services as required in the job description
German language proficiency is only basic, while high on-site presence in Berlin is required
response.justification: The candidate brings deep fullstack expertise in TypeScript and modern web technologies with a strong track record of building scalable systems, but their senior-level titles and lack of explicit alignment with key required tools like PostgreSQL or Nest.js raise questions about role fit, compounded by limited German proficiency for an on-site position.
